headlines.title: Netanyahu orders deeper Israeli incursion into Lebanon to hit Hezbollah
headlines.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu ordered troops to move further into Lebanon in the battle against the Iran-backed Hezbollah militant group, despite a ceasefire announced.

headlines.title: Israeli army captures strategic castle in Lebanon in deepest incursion into the country in 26 years
headlines.summary: Israeli military captured the strategic Beaufort Castle and warned everyone south of the Zahrani river should leave.

headlines.title: Hundreds arrested and dozens of police injured after Champions League riots in France
headlines.summary: Nearly 800 people were arrested after clashes with police which saw 219 people injured, including 57 police officers.

headlines.title: US says it struck a commercial ship trying to breach blockade and reach Iran
headlines.summary: US military action in the Strait of Hormuz region amid ongoing tensions with Iran.

headlines.title: Maltese Prime Minister Robert Abela claims record-breaking fourth successive general election victory
headlines.summary: Labour Party secures historic fourth consecutive term in Malta's general election.

headlines.title: Ebola spread in DR Congo 'deeply alarming', MSF warns
headlines.summary: The medical charity's comments come as the head of the World Health Organization visits the region worst-hit by the virus outbreak.

headlines.title: Japan defence minister denies militarism and criticises China's 'huge arsenal'
headlines.summary: Shinjiro Koizumi makes some of Tokyo's most pointed remarks yet in the dispute over Japan's military build-up.

headlines.title: UN places Israel and Russia on sexual violence blacklist
headlines.summary: The United Nations added Israel and Russia to a U.N. blacklist of countries suspected of committing sexual violence in conflict zones.

headlines.title: British foreign minister Yvette Cooper to travel to China and India
headlines.summary: Visits to focus on global issues from the Strait of Hormuz and the Russia-Ukraine war to the recent Ebola outbreak.

headlines.title: Colombia votes in presidential election that could redefine relations with US
headlines.summary: The election is held after months of public recrimination between current left-wing President Gustavo Petro and his US counterpart Donald Trump.

headlines.title: Laos cave survivors help with plan to find last two missing men
headlines.summary: So far, five men have been freed from the narrow, flooded cave but efforts are ongoing to locate two more.

headlines.title: South Africa made to look like fools after World Cup visa issues
headlines.summary: The country's football association says it is working to resolve the problems that have delayed the team's departure to Mexico.
